author: Microsoft
name: .NET MAUI App
description: A project for creating a .NET MAUI application for iOS, Android, Mac Catalyst and WinUI
postActions/restore/description: Restore NuGet packages required by this project.
symbols/Framework/description: The target framework for the project.
symbols/IncludeSampleContent/description: Configures whether to add sample pages and functionality to demonstrate basic usage patterns in the XAML experience.
symbols/skipRestore/description: If specified, skips the automatic restore of the project on create.
symbols/UI/description: Choose the app UI style. XAML remains the default experience, while C# creates App, AppShell, and MainPage in code using CommunityToolkit.Maui.Markup.
symbols/UI/choices/xaml/description: Create the app UI with XAML.
symbols/UI/choices/csharp/description: Create the app UI with fluent C# Markup.
